title: Section 11A
content: 1[11A. Definitions.--In this Chapter, unless the context otherwise requires,-- (a) "illegal import" means the import of any goods in contravention of the provisions of this Act or any other law for the time being in force; (b) "intimated place" means a place intimated under sub-section (1), sub-section (2) or sub-section (3), as the case may be, of section 11C; (c) "notified date", in relation to goods of any description, means the date on which the notification in relation to such goods is issued under section 11B; (d) "notified goods" means goods specified in the notification issued under section 11B.]
footnote: 1. Chapters IVA, IVB and IVC ins. by Act 12 of 1969, s. 2 (w.e.f. 3-1-1969).
